targetCGPA.description: The user's target CGPA for the end of the course.

SemesterGrades.title: Semester Grades
SemesterGrades.description: Stores grades for a specific semester for a user.

grades.description: A map of course codes to grades (O, A+, A, B+, B, C, U).

/semesterGrades/{gradeId}.description: Grades for a specific semester. gradeId is usually uid_semester.
